name: Baked Acorn Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 2-cup glass measure on high for 1 minute.
2. Wash the squash and pierce it. Place on microwave-safe plate.
3. Cook the squash on high for 2 minutes.
4. Cut each squash lengthwise in half. Remove seeds and fibers.
5. Place cut sides down in a 12 x 7 x 2-inch microwave-safe baking dish.
6. Cook the squash on high for 6 minutes.
7. While the squash is cooking, mix remaining ingredients with melted butter well.
8. Turn the squash cut side up. Divide crumb mixture among the halves.
9. Cover and cook on high for 6 to 8 minutes or until squash is tender.
10. Remove cover and let stand 5 minutes before serving.
11. Makes 4 servings.
12. Total Cooking Time: 15 to 17 Minutes
